MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John P. Baba, Esq. for Plaintiff
Christina Jackson, Property Manager for Plaintiff, FP 2001 Co.
Philip S. Horne, Esq. for Defendant
David Noor, Defendant

Settlement Conference held. Case settled. The terms of the agreement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff pays $35,000 to Defendant
Defendant will remain in the premises located at 1390 Market St, #2904, SF, CA for 6 months and vacate the premises by 9/1/04 at 5pm
Plaintiff will deduct $3,500 off the $35,000 upon signing the settlement agreement.
For the 6 months the Defendant remains on the said premises, Defendant will keep his dog on a leash or Defendant will be assessed 10% of $35,000.
Defendant will not go into the Property Management Office or Defendant will be assessed 10% of $35,000.
Defendant will only have contact with Christina Jackson.
Defendant will not be liable for pro rata share of the rent.
Parties will submitt a formal settlement agreement by 3/1/04.
Jury trial vacated.
JPT: Irving Pfeffer (503B), Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge
